pull-request-header:
## 🚀 Release — Pending Promotion

> This PR was automatically generated by [release-please](https://github.com/googleapis/release-please).
> It tracks all releasable changes since the last release across all applications.

### 📋 What happens when this PR is merged?

| Step | Action |
|------|--------|
| 1️⃣ | `CHANGELOG.md` and `package.json` files are updated per app |
| 2️⃣ | One GitHub Release + git tag is created per app |
| 3️⃣ | Promotion pipeline triggers — `latest-dev` → x.x.x (automatically deploy in TST)| 4️⃣ | Pending approval to deploy `x.x.x` in PROD |

### 📦 Release Notes Previe
pull-request-footer:
### 🔍 Before merging, verify

- [ ] Dev image is healthy and tested in the dev environment
- [ ] No pending bugs that should be included in this release
- [ ] CHANGELOG entries are accurate and meaningful
